title: Alcatraz Security: Mossel Bay’s specialists
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Alcatraz Security, Mossel Bay's first tactically trained security company, has officially laid its boots on the ground.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Alcatraz Security, Mossel Bay's first tactically trained security company, has officially laid its boots on the ground."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The company was founded by Alwyn Landman and Adam de Moor, both born and raised in Mossel Bay, and Andrew Brown, a Mossel Bay resident for almost two decades. This trio has comprehensive knowledge of the area and local security needs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alcatraz Security boasts a tactical armed response team of professional and qualified security personnel, ready to respond to any security emergency, 24 hours a day.","html":"Alcatraz Security boasts a tactical armed response team of professional and qualified security personnel, ready to respond to any security emergency, 24 hours a day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It works in association with PPA Tactical, an industry-leading Cape Town-based private security company founded 12 years ago with a focus on tactical armed response.","html":"It works in association with PPA Tactical, an industry-leading Cape Town-based private security company founded 12 years ago with a focus on tactical armed response."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This means highly trained security personnel are coupled with extensive knowledge and resources to fight crime.","html":"This means highly trained security personnel are coupled with extensive knowledge and resources to fight crime."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PPA is an internationally recognised and accredited training institution. PPA's partners, directors and instructors have real-world experience in advanced tactical operations, nationally and globally, including tactical K9 operations as well as high-profile, high-risk VIP protection, hostage release and hostage rescue.","html":"PPA is an internationally recognised and accredited training institution. PPA's partners, directors and instructors have real-world experience in advanced tactical operations, nationally and globally, including tactical K9 operations as well as high-profile, high-risk VIP protection, hostage release and hostage rescue."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PPA-trained security personnel, like those at Alcatraz Security, are ready to handle all of your security needs.","html":"PPA-trained security personnel, like those at Alcatraz Security, are ready to handle all of your security needs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As Mossel Bay continues to grow, the founders of Alcatraz Security recognise a need for a security company with highly trained security personnel who will work hand in hand with law enforcement and the police to make the community safer.","html":"As Mossel Bay continues to grow, the founders of Alcatraz Security recognise a need for a security company with highly trained security personnel who will work hand in hand with law enforcement and the police to make the community safer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alcatraz Security utilises advanced monitoring systems and integrated technology, which makes it an industry leader in tactical armed response.","html":"Alcatraz Security utilises advanced monitoring systems and integrated technology, which makes it an industry leader in tactical armed response."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When a client's alarm is triggered, military signals are sent out - one to the fully monitored control room and two to the closest response vehicles. These vehicles are geolocated to the client's position, while the control room then focuses on contacting the client to determine what the emergency is and what other services may be needed.","html":"When a client's alarm is triggered, military signals are sent out - one to the fully monitored control room and two to the closest response vehicles. These vehicles are geolocated to the client's position, while the control room then focuses on contacting the client to determine what the emergency is and what other services may be needed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alcatraz Security also offers a PPA panic app, which will enable its guards to respond to any security emergency, no matter where the client is situated in South Africa and 27 international countries.","html":"Alcatraz Security also offers a PPA panic app, which will enable its guards to respond to any security emergency, no matter where the client is situated in South Africa and 27 international countries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alcatraz Security, in association with PPA, has as its top priority the safety and security needs of the Mossel Bay community.","html":"Alcatraz Security, in association with PPA, has as its top priority the safety and security needs of the Mossel Bay community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on Alcatraz, based at 4 Sioux Street, Voorbaai, Mossel Bay, call 044 220 4020, visit https://www.alsec.co.za/ or email [email protected].","html":"For more information on Alcatraz, based at 4 Sioux Street, Voorbaai, Mossel Bay, call 044 220 4020, visit https://www.alsec.co.za/ or email [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Schalk van der Watt, Ryan Jansen, Adam de Moor, Vusumzi Mei, Kallie Landman and Andrew Brown. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse","html":"Schalk van der Watt, Ryan Jansen, Adam de Moor, Vusumzi Mei, Kallie Landman and Andrew Brown. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
